EmailTemplate.name: D36 Let Us Help
EmailTemplate.subject: Affirm Financial Let Us Help
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Product__c.First_Name__c},
According to our records, your Affirm Mastercard® account is currently past due and in collections. To avoid further collection activities and further negatively impacting your credit, it is imperative that a payment is made immediately.
The amount required to bring your account into good standing is {!Product__c.Minimum_Payment_Amount__c}.
Make your payments using the options listed below:
Set up a one-time bill payment through your online banking. Just add Payee: “Affirm Mastercard” or pay directly at your local bank. Visit a Western Union with a Western Union Quick Collect (WUQC). Use “Affirm Canada” for code city, “BC” for code Province. Mail a cheque to: Affirm Card, PO Box 48235, Vancouver, BC, V7X 1A1. Pay online using TelPay at TelPay.ca.
If you have failed to contact us simply because you cannot pay the amount owing, it is possible we can work with you to determine payment options. Please contact us at 1-855-266-3131. Hours of operation are as follows:
Monday-Thursday 8:00 AM-7:00 PM EST Friday 8:00 AM-6:00 PM EST Saturday 9:00 AM-5:00 PM EST
Sincerely,
Affirm Financial Services 1-855-266-3131
If your records reflect that you paid this payment prior to the date of this email please contact us so that the discrepancy can be resolved and any necessary corrections made on your account. Note that payments made using non-guaranteed funds may not create available credit on your account for up to 7 days to allow the payment to clear. Please see your Cardholder Agreement for the full terms on your account. You are receiving this email as per the agreed upon terms in your Cardholder Agreement.
Affirm Mastercard®. This card is issued by Peoples Trust Company under licence from Mastercard International. ®/TM Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Incorporated.
